channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Barriers left, 11th May
item.description:
There are crowd control barriers left on welland street that have been there for over 2 weeks, these are a hazard to anyone trying to use the footpath especially if they are in a wheelchair or pushing a team.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Welland Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Looks like toilet water because it’s very bad smell, 11th May
item.description:
I live in flat N/4 DA8 1GZ and this main hole smells very bad and I want to report because it’s just beside my kitchen window. I will appreciate if you take action for this problem thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wharf House, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa chair on pavement dumped, 11th May
item.description:
There is a sofa on the pavement that has been fly tipped.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longhill Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents at 8 Ufton Rd are constantly fly tipping, 11th May
item.description:
Household appliances are regularly dumped on the public pavement outside of their garden. This has been happening for months since they moved in last summer
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ufton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reporting junk food waste + plastic - twice in less than a week- Urgent action required, 11th May
item.description:
In less than a week, I have reported food waste on the pavement of Leroy street SE1 4SW. Same Situation, men park their cars, eat junk food and leave it on the pavement. Action???? Vidéosurveillance to be installed ASAP My Thanks to the council street cleaning teams ! ( they deserve respect And your inaction is unacceptable)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leroy Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building materials blocking pavement and wheelchair ingress. Wheelchair has to go onto single lane road to pass and is dangerous, 11th May
item.description:
Building materials blocking pavement and wheelchair ingress. Wheelchair has to go onto single lane road to pass and is dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated flytipping, 11th May
item.description:
Dumped furniture just before the railway bridge and a large fridge at the other end.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beverley Court, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree outside 22 Villiers Road needs pruning, 11th May
item.description:
Tree outside 22 Villiers Road needs pruning And is causing obstruction on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped under pathway by station exit, 11th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenside Grove, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 dog poos on the road outside 40 and 42 Caradoc street, 11th May
item.description:
Repeated issue of dog fouling on Caradoc street. It’s pretty bad considering how narrow the pavements are and that front doors enter directly into people’s living spaces. Please could this be cleaned up and enforcement provided.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Caradoc Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars obstructing pavement, 11th May
item.description:
Neri Motors is constantly driving cars onto the pavement and causing obstruction and danger to pedestrians.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 11th May
item.description:
Fly tipping- same place as always. Why can’t something be done to stop this Rubbish needs to be swept along the kerb down that end of the road as well, supposedly the street was swept today but why is there still rubbish along the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: See map, 11th May
item.description:
Fly tipped poof

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Graffiti, 11th May
item.description:
Graffiti on green utility box in front of church

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A white sack, seems to contain gravel next to metal barrier on foot path, 11th May
item.description:
A bag of gravel has been dumped on footpath near the metal barrier. Footpath leading from Whitebeam Ave & then Shrubs Cottages. Can you please take away, has been there for a couple of weeks. Thank yoi.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 11th May
item.description:
There are four big cardboard boxes, a TV, a chair and a few other pieces of rubbish outside the bins. It has been here since Saturday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 11th May
item.description:
On pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upland Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 11th May
item.description:
This has been here for two weeks and not from household

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need pruning, 11th May
item.description:
The large blossom tree branches are hanging so low yiu have to duck to go under them and I'm on 5ft 2. It is also now touching my front hedge. The large tree to the side of my property is overhanging my tv ariel effecting signal and is now starting to overhang my back garden fence. Can these be cut back asap please as this is also causing lots of leaves ext to block our side pathway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 11th May
item.description:
Graffiti on Master Shipwrights house wall and gate on Watergate street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watergate Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet
